project_info.name: NXT8 Multi-agent OS - 3D Agent Room
project_info.archetype: Archetype 5 (Luxury / Cinematic) mixed with High-Contrast Tech
project_info.description: Standalone 3D Agent Room page providing a visually strong, static cinematic environment with voxel-like agents, glowing desk pods, and a digital skyline.

surfaces.floating_label: backdrop-blur-md bg-black/50 border border-white/20 rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-xs text-white uppercase tracking-widest

setup.renderer: WebGLRenderer with antialias: true, alpha: true

lighting.neon_halos: PointLights positioned above/under each agent pod with colors matching agent roles (cyan, magenta, amber) and intensity 2.0

scene_objects.floor: PlaneGeometry, deeply reflective standard material (roughness 0.1, metalness 0.9), overlaid with a subtle grid texture
scene_objects.digital_wall: Curved plane in the background with a custom shader or wireframe material to simulate glowing vertical data streams / skyline
scene_objects.pods: Cylinder geometries acting as high-tech desks, dark metal materials with emissive rings
scene_objects.agents: Grouped BoxGeometries (voxels) representing the physical form of the OS agents, utilizing MeshStandardMaterial with emissive maps, floating slightly above pods

animations.library: GSAP (for camera movement and smooth UI transitions)
animations.idle: Agents bobbing up and down slightly using Math.sin(time * speed), slow rotation of the pods
animations.interaction: On raycaster intersect, hovered agent pod glows brighter, scaling up by 1.05

layout.wrapper: Absolute positioned full-screen div over canvas, pointer-events-none (except for interactive elements)
layout.floating_labels: HTML elements mapped to 3D coordinates via Vector3.project(camera). Glassmorphism pills attached to each agent.
layout.detail_panel: Fixed right panel (width 400px), slides in on agent click (pointer-events-auto). Contains agent persona details, token stats, and 'Initialize' CTA.
layout.entry_points: Top-left absolute positioned button to return to the main NXT8 dashboard navigation.

interactions.agent_click: Camera lerps (via GSAP) to focus closely on the selected pod, detail panel slides in from the right, unselected pods dim.

instructions_to_main_agent: Create index.html and any necessary JS/CSS assets in /frontend/public/agents-room/.
Import Three.js, GSAP, and Tailwind via CDN in the HTML file.
Implement a cinematic, dark 3D scene matching the styling of Archetype 5 (Luxury) and tech OS elements. DO NOT use generic Vercel/Stripe styles.
Construct voxel agents using groups of Three.js BoxGeometries. Assign a distinct neon accent color (cyan, magenta, etc.) to each agent's pod.
Add a glassmorphism UI overlay for the detail panel using raw HTML/Tailwind classes.
Ensure all interactive UI elements have the specified data-testid attributes for testing.
DO NOT use React or Shadcn here, as this is specifically a standalone static Three.js HTML page.
Use GSAP to animate camera transitions when an agent is selected, moving the view to a dramatic, close-up isometric angle.
